  build             Builds the project in the current directory.

  clean             Cleans the specified project.

  create            Creates new projects.

  test              Runs all the test project inside a solutions.

  list              Lists available packages.

  install           Installs a package.

  uninstall         Uninstalls a package.

  print-env         Prints the environment provided by a package.

  create-package    Creates a package.

  push-package      Pushes a package.

  package           Compresses a directory into a valid package. Requires 7z to

  help              Display more information on a specific command.

  version           Display version information.

commands.payload:
avalon 0.10.1
Copyright 2021 © VitalElement

  build             Builds the project in the current directory.

  clean             Cleans the specified project.

  create            Creates new projects.

  test              Runs all the test project inside a solutions.

  list              Lists available packages.

  install           Installs a package.

  uninstall         Uninstalls a package.

  print-env         Prints the environment provided by a package.

  create-package    Creates a package.

  push-package      Pushes a package.

  package           Compresses a directory into a valid package. Requires 7z to
                    be available.

  archive-cache     Places all the cache (appdata and toolchains) in an 
                    uncompressed tar file.

  help              Display more information on a specific command.

  version           Display version information.
